name: @quoin/tokens-ant
description: Ant Design (light theme) palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Ant Design v5 default 'light' theme. Ant's daybreak-blue (#1677FF area) drives accent. Ant uses a 10-step palette per color (X-1..X-10) with X-6 as the standard step.
